title: Use of Color
description: Color is not used as the only visual means of conveying information, indicating an action, prompting a response, or distinguishing a visual element. This success criterion addresses color perception specifically. Other forms of perception are covered in Guideline 1.3 including programmatic access to color and other visual presentation coding.
